title: Week of March 30, 2026
summary: This week brought significant enhancements to OpsPal's skill discovery capabilities, with a comprehensive skill catalog now featuring 683 skills across 25 categories to help you identify automation opportunities. Salesforce deployments became more reliable with improved error recovery and better handling of complex configurations. Multiple stability fixes ensure smoother operations across all your RevOps workflows.

entries.headline: New command to promote discovered skills for automation
Comprehensive skill catalog with 683 automation opportunities across 25 categories
Enhanced data import reliability and workflow documentation
Salesforce deployments now recover automatically from errors
Plugin names now display consistently throughout the platform
Headlines now display with proper capitalization
Restored access to historical data from weeks 12 and 13
Better Salesforce field validation and deployment reliability
details: Detects potential State/Country picklist configuration issues
Improved validation for complex field references
More reliable deployment process with automatic retries

entries.headline: Complex Salesforce deployments now use enhanced workflow management
HubSpot workflows now launch properly after configuration issue
